allocation_strategy: Clinical judgment and educational efficiency prioritizing high-yield differentials

questions.topic: DCIS vs. Atypical Ductal Hyperplasia differential
questions.education_objective: Distinguish between DCIS and ADH using morphologic criteria and clinical significance

questions.topic: Invasive ductal carcinoma NOS: histologic features & grading
questions.education_objective: Recognize morphologic features and apply histologic grading systems for invasive ductal carcinoma

questions.topic: LCIS vs. Atypical Lobular Hyperplasia differential
questions.education_objective: Differentiate LCIS from ALH and understand risk stratification implications

questions.topic: Invasive lobular carcinoma: patterns & E-cadherin staining
questions.education_objective: Identify growth patterns of invasive lobular carcinoma and interpret E-cadherin immunostaining
Recognize tubular carcinoma morphology and distinguish from benign mimics
Identify mucinous carcinoma variants and correlate with prognosis
Recognize micropapillary carcinoma and understand its staging/prognostic implications
Correlate pathologic findings with clinical presentation of inflammatory breast carcinoma
Interpret and report hormone receptor and HER2 status according to current guidelines
Assess lymph node involvement and apply staging criteria for breast carcinoma

questions.topic: Biomarker patterns in special carcinoma types
questions.education_objective: Correlate biomarker expression patterns with specific breast carcinoma subtypes
Interpret Ki-67 proliferation index and understand emerging prognostic biomarkers

questions.topic: Usual ductal hyperplasia vs. atypical patterns
questions.education_objective: Distinguish usual ductal hyperplasia from atypical ductal hyperplasia
Differentiate sclerosing adenosis from tubular carcinoma using morphologic and immunohistochemical criteria
Recognize radial scar morphology and understand associated malignancy risk
Understand the spectrum of epithelial hyperplasia and its classification
Identify fibroadenoma variants and distinguish from other stromal lesions
Recognize complex sclerosing lesions and assess associated malignancy risk

questions.topic: Phyllodes tumor: grading & differential from fibroadenoma
questions.education_objective: Grade phyllodes tumors and distinguish from fibroadenoma

questions.topic: Papillary lesions: benign vs. malignant features
questions.education_objective: Differentiate benign from malignant papillary lesions
Recognize adenomyoepithelioma and understand myoepithelial differentiation
Diagnose angiosarcoma and distinguish primary from radiation-induced forms
Recognize Paget disease morphology and confirm diagnosis with immunohistochemistry

questions.topic: Metastases to breast: common primaries & patterns
questions.education_objective: Identify metastatic carcinoma to breast and recognize common primary sites
Distinguish fat necrosis from malignancy in various stages of evolution
Recognize granulomatous mastitis and understand differential diagnosis
Identify gynecomastia patterns and distinguish from other male breast lesions
Recognize PASH morphology and understand its clinical significance

questions.topic: Lymphoma of breast: primary vs. secondary
questions.education_objective: Diagnose breast lymphoma and distinguish primary from secondary involvement
Recognize therapy-induced changes and understand male/transgender breast pathology
